actions.restoreDefaultsWarning: This will reset all capabilities to the system template defaults. Custom changes will be lost.

security.disableConfirmMessage: Your account will be less secure without 2FA. You can turn it back on at any time.
security.sessionsHint: Ends within ~15m (access-token TTL); refresh tokens revoked immediately.
security.sessionsSignOutConfirmMessage: You'll need to sign in again on every device. This browser is included.
security.sessionsSignOutError: Could not sign out everywhere. Please try again.

security.twofaCtaDescription: Protect your account with a code from your phone every time you sign in. Takes about 2 minutes to set up.
security.twofaOnHint: A second-factor code is required at sign-in.

disable2fa.dialogDescription: Confirm with a fresh code to turn off two-factor on your account.
disable2fa.emailBody: We sent a code to {{dest}}. Enter it below to turn off two-factor.
disable2fa.errorInvalid: That code didn't work. Try again.
disable2fa.errorMandate: Two-factor authentication is required at your company. Contact your administrator.
disable2fa.errorRequest: Couldn't start the disable flow. Please try again.
disable2fa.smsBody: We sent a code to {{dest}}. Enter it below to turn off two-factor.
disable2fa.totpBody: Enter the current 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

twoFactorSetup.emailDescription: Each sign-in, you'll get an email with a 6-digit code.
twoFactorSetup.emailReadonlyHint: Your sign-in email — can't change this here.
twoFactorSetup.emailWarningBody: if your email account is compromised, this protection is broken. Make sure your email is itself secured.
twoFactorSetup.errorVerify: That code didn't work. Try again.
twoFactorSetup.manualLabel: Can't scan? Enter this code manually:
twoFactorSetup.methodAdminReset: Lost access to your second factor? An admin can reset it for you.
twoFactorSetup.methodDescription: Pick whatever's easiest for you — you can change later.
twoFactorSetup.methodEmailDesc: We send a code to your sign-in email each time you sign in. Convenient — but your email account must itself be secure.
twoFactorSetup.methodPasskeyDesc: Face ID, fingerprint, or device PIN. No code to type — just touch a button. We're building this next.
twoFactorSetup.methodSmsDesc: We send a code to your phone via SMS. Works on any phone, no app needed.
twoFactorSetup.methodTotpDesc: 1Password, Authy, Google Authenticator — a free app on your phone shows a 6-digit code that refreshes every 30 seconds.
twoFactorSetup.phoneInvalid: Enter a number in international format, e.g. +16785551234.
twoFactorSetup.qrDescription: Open your authenticator app (1Password, Authy, Google Authenticator) and tap “+ Add account” or the scan icon.
twoFactorSetup.qrTitle: Scan this code with your app
twoFactorSetup.recoveryBody: Contact a company admin to reset 2FA on your account.
twoFactorSetup.smsDescription: We'll send a 6-digit code each time you sign in. Standard SMS rates apply.
twoFactorSetup.smsHint: Use international format (E.164). We'll send a test code to confirm.
twoFactorSetup.smsTitle: Where should we text the code?
twoFactorSetup.title: Set up two-factor
twoFactorSetup.verifyDescription: Your app should now be showing a code that changes every 30 seconds. Entering it correctly turns on 2FA for your account.
twoFactorSetup.verifyEmailDescription: We emailed a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below.
twoFactorSetup.verifySmsDescription: We texted a 6-digit code to {{phone}}. Enter it below.

audit.title: Audit History
audit.noHistoryHelper: Changes to this record will appear here
